name: seo_geo_claude_skills_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the seo_geo_claude_skills capability.

prompts.name: keyword_research_prompt
prompts.template: Analyze the following keywords for search volume, competition, and GEO relevance: {keyword_list} in region {geographic_region}.
prompts.use_case: Generating optimized content for websites targeting specific geographic locations.

prompts.name: content_writing_prompt
prompts.template: Generate SEO-optimized content on the topic: {keyword_list}, adhering to CORE-EEAT and CITE frameworks.
prompts.use_case: Conducting comprehensive SEO audits to improve website technical health.

prompts.name: technical_audit_prompt
prompts.template: Perform a full technical SEO audit of the website at URL: {website_url} and report critical issues.
prompts.use_case: Performing keyword research to identify valuable SEO and GEO opportunities.

prompts.name: rank_tracking_prompt
prompts.template: Provide rank tracking report for keywords: {keyword_list} on domain {website_url} over the last 30 days.
prompts.use_case: Tracking keyword ranking progress for ongoing SEO campaigns.

prompts.name: seo_compliance_check_prompt
prompts.template: Evaluate the content for compliance with CORE-EEAT and CITE SEO frameworks and return a compliance flag.
prompts.use_case: Applying CORE-EEAT and CITE frameworks to enhance content trustworthiness and expertise.
